name: imspeed
description: A model-routed software development workflow with planning, TDD, adaptive subagents, review, and delivery gates.

interface.shortDescription: Fast model-routed planning, coding, testing, and review
interface.longDescription: Use IMSpeed to route architecture, planning, implementation, debugging, and review to named Codex agents with explicit models, reasoning efforts, and bounded escalation.
